findings.summary: I2C bus missing pullup observation is technically accurate for this board
findings.details: The analyzer reports SCL and SDA have no pullup resistors (has_pullup=false). This is correct -- pullups are expected to be on the peripheral modules.

findings.summary: Courtyard overlaps correctly detected: U1 (ESP32 DevKit) contains R1 within its courtyard
findings.details: The placement_analysis correctly identifies U1/R1 overlap of 64.16mm2 and J2/R2 overlap of 15.72mm2.
